title: How much money did the TV series and movies make
display_title: How much money did the TV series and movies make
wikitext:
[]: How much money did the TV series and movies make?             Quote Post by bluekaterpillar » Fri Aug 29, 2014 12:34 am According to Wikipedia, the Evangelion franchise grossed over 150 billion yen (about 1.44 billion dollars). However, this number appears to include everything : series, movies, manga, rebuilds, games, and (possibly) other merchandise. I would like to know: how much money did the TV series and the first 2 movies (D&R and EoE, not the Rebuilds) each make? If possible, I would also like to know how much they made in each country (especially Japan and the US). Sources would be greatly appreciated.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 29, 2014 9:16 am Japanese wiki has a small summary section with some citations Specific pages for ye olde movies list their box office as: Death and Rebirth = 1.87 billion yen EoE = 2.47 billion yen

[]:             Quote Post by bluekaterpillar » Fri Aug 29, 2014 2:17 pm So the TV series itself only made 4.5 billion yen out of the 150 billion yen total? And the movies made another 4.34 billion combined? (or did Goggle Translate get it wrong?) That is a surprisingly small percentage! OK, does it also say how much money the series made in the US?

[]:             Quote Post by LegionWrex » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:24 pm bluekaterpillar wrote: So the TV series itself only made 4.5 billion yen out of the 150 billion yen total? And the movies made another 4.34 billion combined? (or did Goggle Translate get it wrong?) That is a surprisingly small percentage!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Sep 12, 2014 9:29 pm One Million Dollars SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ukon the Uproser » Wed Sep 17, 2014 2:12 am Evangelionfreak wrote: One Million Dollars SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Sep 21, 2014 10:10 am Mr. Tines wrote: Placeholder post. Delete later.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Sep 22, 2014 5:26 am The only true answer is LOADSAMONEY.
